statements: TunnelMind AI, LLC has not received any National Security Letters.
TunnelMind AI, LLC has not received any FISA court orders.
TunnelMind AI, LLC has not received any gag orders that would prevent disclosure of surveillance requests.
TunnelMind AI, LLC has not been compelled to install any backdoors or intentional vulnerabilities in its systems.
TunnelMind AI, LLC has not been compelled to modify its cryptographic systems to enable monitoring.
update_schedule: This canary is reviewed and updated monthly. Absence of an update by the stated date should be treated as a canary failure.
pgp_note: A PGP-signed version of this canary is available at https://tunnelmind.ai/canary.asc
